name: @aily-project/lib-seeed-rpcble
description: Wio Terminal rpcBLE Blockly库，支持BLE服务端、客户端、扫描、UART、Web Bluetooth电池服务和iBeacon。
description_zh_cn: Wio Terminal rpcBLE Blockly库，支持BLE服务端、客户端、扫描、UART、Web Bluetooth电池服务和iBeacon。
description_en: Blockly wrapper for Seeed Wio Terminal rpcBLE with BLE server, client, scan, UART, Web Bluetooth battery service, and iBeacon support.
author: Seeed Studio
